creator: t.x00100x.t@yandex.ru
text:
Created attachment 246356
Adding Serious Sam Classic for FreeBSD

Hello.

The FreeBSD ports contain very outdated versions of the game Serious Sam.
They also contain errors. For example: The main boss cannot be killed.

I decided to make ports based on the source code released by Croteam.
https://github.com/Croteam-official/Serious-Engine
Source code here:
https://github.com/tx00100xt/SeriousSamClassic (OpenGL version)
https://github.com/tx00100xt/SeriousSamClassic-Vk (Vulkan/OpenGL version)

The ports have been tested to work on FreeBSD-14.
On i386 and amd64 architectures.
Performance has also been tested on aarch64 and armv7 architectures under Linux.

Tested building for powerpc64le,riscv64,s390x architectures
(GitНub Action)
Without run. There is no possibility for me.
